name: Luck of the Irish Dessert Squares
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare CHOCOLATE CRUMB CRUST: In a small bowl, stir together all ingredients until well blended. Press the crumb mixture onto the bottom of a 9-inch square pan.
2. For CHOCOLATE LAYER: In a small bowl, beat cream cheese until fluffy. Gradually add sugar, beating until well blended. Add cocoa alternately with milk, beating until smooth. Gradually fold in 3 cups whipped topping; spoon the mixture over the crumb crust.
3. For TOPPING: In a small bowl, stir together remaining 2 cups whipped topping, mint extract and food color; spread over chocolate layer. Cover and refrigerate about 6 hours or until set. Cut into squares. Garnish with mint leaves, if desired. Store leftover dessert in the refrigerator.
